instruction: Find the Monthly forecast for Manchester, GB for this month

evaluator.eval: check_direct_json_object(get_url_dashPart(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.', 'partIndex': -2, 'needDeleteId': False, 'returnType': 'json', 'key': 'time'}), rules=get_rule_relativeTime(env, config={'rules': {'relativeTime': {'from': 'this month'}, 'expected': {'time': '{month}-weather'}}})) and is_expected_url_pattern_match(get_active_url_from_accessTree(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.'}), rules={'expected': ['/manchester/']})
